name: SOB
description: $SOB is a community-driven memecoin on the Solana blockchain that embraces the emotional rollercoaster of cryptocurrency trading. Built around the universally relatable crying emoji 😭, $SOB represents every trader's journey through market volatility - the highs, the lows, and everything in between. The project combines humor with genuine community engagement, offering holders an interactive gaming experience through "Catch the Tears," a browser-based game where players compete for leaderboard rankings. This gamification element creates utility beyond simple token speculation, fostering active participation and community building.
